---
title: ""
toc: false
---

# Contact

I welcome opportunities to connect around wildlife disease ecology, conservation physiology, One Health, environmental health, Puerto Rican island science, student mentoring, and community-based conservation.

## Email

**Email:** [alan.figueroa@upr.edu](mailto:alan.figueroa@upr.edu)

Replace this placeholder with your preferred professional email.

## Professional links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/ajfigueroaruiz)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alfiru)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-0484-3257)
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Alan-Figueroa-Ruiz)
- [protocols.io](https://www.protocols.io/researchers/alfiru)

## Microsoft - Book Time to Meet with Me

- [Book Time](https://outlook.office.com/bookwithme/user/6d14d094f2d34a2390a4a9699a33e653@upr.edu?anonymous&ismsaljsauthenabled&ep=plink)

## Research affiliation

**Department of Biology**  
University of Puerto Rico at Mayagüez  

**ViDaB Lab**  
Virus Diversity and Bioinformatics Laboratory

## Collaboration interests

I am especially interested in collaborations related to:

- Wildlife disease ecology
- Marine mammal conservation
- *Toxoplasma gondii* transmission
- Environmental surveillance
- One Health
- Conservation physiology
- Bioinformatics and reproducible research
- Community-based science education
